inputs.label: Initial Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of material at the start of the drying process

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of material at the start of the drying process

inputs.label: Dry Weight
inputs.businessContext: Asymptotic bone-dry weight of the material (lowest attainable weight)

businessContext_i18n.en: Asymptotic bone-dry weight of the material (lowest attainable weight)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin asimptotik kemik kuru ağırlığı (ulaşılabilir en düşük ağırlık)

inputs.label: Target Weight
inputs.businessContext: Desired final weight after drying (must be > dryWeight)

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired final weight after drying (must be > dryWeight)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurutma sonrası istenen nihai ağırlık (dryWeight'ten büyük olmalıdır)

inputs.label: Drying Rate Constant
inputs.businessContext: Exponential drying constant (k) characterizing the speed of moisture removal

businessContext_i18n.en: Exponential drying constant (k) characterizing the speed of moisture removal
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nem giderme hızını karakterize eden üstel kurutma sabiti (k)

inputs.label: Process Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency factor (0–100) scaling the effective drying rate

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency factor (0–100) scaling the effective drying rate
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verimlilik faktörü (0–100), efektif kurutma hızını ölçekler

inputs.label: Setup Time
inputs.businessContext: Initial handling or delay time before active drying begins

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial handling or delay time before active drying begins
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktif kurutma başlamadan önceki ilk işlem veya gecikme süresi

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
